body.listing_text: Beach cottage in Oceanside, dog friendly, walk to the strand.

body.guest_context: Is the place dog friendly and is early check-in possible?

title.title: NemoClaw
title.subtitle: Hermes coordination for property managers
title.narration: NemoClaw. An A.I. operations layer for short-term rental managers, with Nous Hermes handling the coordination.

end.title: One property manager. Many agents.
end.subtitle: Hermes connects the work
end.narration: One property manager. Many agents. Hermes connects the work.

scenes.caption: Turnover loop: checkout to ready. Sweet Clementine is stalled at inspection.
scenes.narration: Every property runs a turnover loop. Checkout, clean, inspect, ready to book. Here the agent has flagged Sweet Clementine as stalled. The inspection never started.

scenes.caption: Hermes drafts the nudge to whoever is blocking the handoff.
scenes.narration: When a handoff stalls, Hermes drafts the nudge to the person who is blocking it. This is a live model call, not a script.

scenes.caption: Hermes reassigns the stalled clean to a free cleaner and pre-authorizes the card.
scenes.narration: For a stuck cleaning, Hermes finds a free cleaner, proposes a time, and with one click reassigns the job and pre-authorizes a single-use card.

scenes.caption: Over- and under-performers flagged, with a Hermes explanation of why.
scenes.narration: Across the portfolio, it flags which properties are over or under performing, and Hermes explains why in plain language.

scenes.caption: The whole book of business as a live graph: firm, owners, properties, crew.
scenes.narration: The whole book of business is a live graph. The firm, its owners, every property, and the cleaning crew, all connected.

scenes.caption: Every action runs as a named, audited agent.
scenes.narration: Every action runs as a named agent on an audited floor. Coordination, scheduling, performance, and payments.

scenes.caption: The owner sees the same loop for their one property.
scenes.narration: The owner sees the same turnover loop for their property, so nothing falls through the cracks.

scenes.caption: The agent sells marketing, sales, and pricing to other agents, paid per call.
scenes.narration: The same agent sells its skills to other agents. Marketing audits, guest replies, and pricing, each one paid for per call.

scenes.caption: Every call settles over HTTP 402. Live marketplace earnings.
scenes.narration: Every call settles over the HTTP four oh two payment standard. This is the live marketplace, where agents earn from other agents.
